positive: A mystical forest landscape silhouette design. The scene features stylized ancient oak trees with gnarled branches, interconnected with bioluminescent roots that form glowing pathways. Incorporate abstract elements like celestial constellations (e.g., stylized crescent moons, comet trails) gently arching over the canopy. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, forest emerald green, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and central, emphasizing clean lines and negative space for print clarity. Minimal detail in the background, focusing on strong, recognizable shapes. Perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. Vector illustration aesthetic, highly detailed line work, clean silhouette, high contrast, ethereal, magical.
negative: text, watermark, logo, blurry, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, grainy, noise, signature, artifacts, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, poor quality
